title: Armor Management
description: Gear up and pick-pocket entities using Minecraft's built-in armor system.
body:
![downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fconnorcode.com%2Fapi%2Fdownloads%3Fmodrinth%3D64kZdtBi%26curseforge%3D1094785&query=%24%5B%27total-human%27%5D&label=downloads&style=for-the-badge&color=0dc362)

Gear up and pick-pocket entities using Minecraft's built-in armor system. Simply add an armor or weapon piece to your off-hand and right click most entities to transfer it into their inventory and shift right click to get all back. This mod uses the default Minecraft armor mechanics and currently doesn't add any new content or models. Be warned that not all entities, especially modded ones, may be supported and you risk loosing items.
